metric_definitions.visible_alpha_count: pixels with alpha>=64; scale floor is 0.2% area, 8% width, and 20% height
metric_definitions.green_dominant_count: visible pixels where G>=96, G>=R+32, and G>=B+32
metric_definitions.chroma_key_like_count: visible pixels where G>=220, R<=48, and B<=48
metric_definitions.foot_anchor: stable bottom center from alpha>=64; sparse low rows are ignored

upper_hair_mask_overlap.definition: alpha>=64 upper-silhouette proxy for hair; not a semantic hair segmentation
